statics.description: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

triggers.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell during your turn, flip a coin. If you lose the flip, CARDNAME deals 1 damage to you. If you win the flip, you may exile NICKNAME. If you do, return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control.

abilities.description: Until your next turn, instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
NICKNAME deals 2 damage divided as you choose among one or two targets. Draw a card if you control a blue permanent other than NICKNAME.
abilities.target_prompt: Select any target to distribute damage to

abilities.description: Exile the top eight cards of your library. You may cast instant and sorcery spells from among them this turn without paying their mana costs.
